Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: protective wear [300209266], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Small panels, usually attached at the neck, which cover the chest and are worn to protect a main garment when eating. Also, any similar part of a garment.
Panel pequeño, generalmente fijado al cuello, con el que se cubre el pecho y que se lleva para proteger la prenda principal mientras se está comiendo. También, cualquier parte similar de una prenda.
Kleine lappen, meestal bevestigd rond de hals, die de borst bedekken en die worden gedragen ter bescherming van de bovenkleding bij het eten, vooral voor kinderen.
小型幅片，通常固定於頸部，覆蓋胸部，於用餐時穿戴以保護主要衣物。亦指衣物任一相似部位。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.
